title: Daily Briefing — Jun 12
headline: Tech rebound is masking broad sector rotation — flows say patience, not chase.
body: Right, so the big picture today: We’ve got a relief bounce in tech — XLK up +3.7%, NVDA +2.2%, but all the megacaps except DELL and ARM are still trading below their daily 20 MAs (e.g. MSFT at $390.34 vs 20 MA $420.46). That’s not bull confirmation, that’s mean reversion after an ugly slide. Fear & Greed is at 30.9 — we're parked near 'Fear' but not at extreme, so this is a market looking for direction, not panic.

Sector rotation is heating up: Industrials (XLI), Healthcare (XLV), Financials (XLF) and Materials (XLB) are showing improving momentum in RRG, while Energy (XLE) and Utilities (XLU) are lagging hard. Watch XLF ($52.62 triggered above all MAs) as the canary — financials are healthy, so no macro alarms on that front, but tech is still leading on RS while breadth is clearly shifting.

Contrarian alert: Retail is flocking back to tech after weeks of FOMO sell-off, but almost every major name is below the daily 20 MA (R006) — don’t chase. VIX is rising above its 20 MA (19.44 vs 17.57), market volatility is building, and the rebound lacks conviction. Patience, react, don’t predict. If it's in the press, it's in the price — this squeeze isn’t real until we see a proper daily close above 20 MA across the board.
callout_body:
SPY: $737.76 (watch SMA20 $745.40 as resistance)
QQQ: $717.12 (SMA20 $721.42)
XLK: $183.21 (SMA20 $183.77, need a close above)
XLF: $52.62 (above all MAs — healthy)
MSFT: $390.34 (SMA20 $420.46)
NVDA: $204.87 (SMA20 $215.97)
HYG: $79.94 (approaching SMA20 $79.57)
VIX: 19.44 (above SMA20) — volatility regime up
action_items: Do NOT chase tech until daily close above 20 MA — sit on hands, abundance mindset.
Monitor XLF and HYG for macro signals — as long as financials and high yield stay strong, risk isn’t breaking. Watch for breakdown.
closing_quote: Less trades = more wins. Don’t break something if it’s simple and good.
